rows.prompt: Tell me a joke about compilers.

adaptive_mtp_gating.formula: measured_decode_speedup = mtp_decode_tokens_per_second / baseline_decode_tokens_per_second; should_enable = measured_decode_speedup >= 1.0 + margin
adaptive_mtp_gating.legacy_formula_note: diagnostic only; it can overestimate exact commit-select by multiplying an already-emitted-token timing ratio by acceptance
adaptive_mtp_gating.structural_limit: Exact speculative verification must be enabled only when measured emitted-token throughput beats baseline by the configured margin; acceptance-only formulas can overestimate speedup.

benchmark_modes.description: Fused verifier result is only useful when the configured MTP path accepts as implemented by the runner.
K=1 exact commit-select serving uses NANO_VLLM_JAX_MTP_BATCH_ACCEPT_POLICY=rowwise by default unless explicitly overridden.
Harness reports the required mode but does not yet split speculative batches into fixed groups of 2.
Harness reports the required mode but does not yet split speculative batches into fixed groups of 4.
Reports measured decode-token throughput gating; exact commit-select enables only when observed decode speedup beats margin.

adaptive_mtp_gating_formula: measured_decode_speedup = mtp_decode_tokens_per_second / baseline_decode_tokens_per_second; should_enable = measured_decode_speedup >= 1.0 + margin
